title: oedera corymbosa
intro: Oedera corymbosa, also known as the Cape fig marigold or Cape marguerite, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Oedera corymbosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
